title: NU Auxin Induced protein degradation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fjvh3","text":"IAA allows OsTir to recognize and target AID(degron)-tagged proteins for degradation. If IAA is depleted, protein expression will return, as regulated by endogenous mechanisms. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"crv6i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5rpac","text":"Induction may be performed with either IAA, 5-Ph-IAA, or 5-Ad-IAA. \u003e90% protein depletion is typically observed within an hour.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9npvr","text":"IAA is only effective for the full length 68 AA degron","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"brpav","text":"**Degradation for 22 Amino Acid nanodegron-tagged proteions requires 5-Ph-IAA (synthetic)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

DMSO","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"efhrn","text":"3. Cell line expressing OsTir and degron-tagged protein of interest","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3nd0e","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare induction agent stock, either IAA or 5-Ph-IAA a. 3-Indoleacetic acid (IAA) (Sigma I2886-5G) *Effective for full length 68 AA degron only. Prepare as a 1 M stock in DMSO b. 5-Ph-IAA (MedChem Express, HY-134653):5-Ph-IAA is efficient as IAA at a much lower dose. Prepare as a 1mM stock in DMSO. c. 5-Ad-IAA (TCI Chemicals A3390-10MG) Prepare as a 1mM stock in DMSO. d. Stock may be repared fresh or frozen at -20°C for 1 year or -80°C for 2 years

Treat cells (density: 1 million KOLF2.2J cells per well of 6-well-plate) with 500 uM IAA* or 1uM 5-Ph-IAA*/5-Ad-IAA or DMSO (Control). * Optimal concentration should be determined for each experimental system. >90% protein suppression is typically observed within 1 hour.
Verify depletion by protein-directed methods (Western blot, IF) with gene-specific or anti-3x-flag antibodies.
Repeat treatment daily to maintain protein loss.
creator: Gina Kirsammer
